title: Villager Music
description:
Adds AI Villager covered Musicdiscs
FORGE
body:
- This Mod is Now **Discontinued** ,find new Mods on my new Account VillagerUltimate (https://modrinth.com/user/VillagerUltimate)

A Forge Mod that adds AI-covered Villager Musicdiscs with MCreator(such as Phonk and other Types)

**You can find which Songs in the Description of the Version**

All Songs where found in an YT Playlist [look in to Github/Source Section]

_**Current Songs in 0.0.0.2**_

**The most accourate Songs Info can be found in the Versions Description**

-Earfquake
-We Didn´t Start The Fire
-There is nothing we can do
-All of the Lights
-Cowbell Warriors
-Me And The Birds

**_Recipes are in the Gallery_**
